title: Magic Sorting System reworked
description: Want a good and efficient sorting system but don't have the time to build an complicated redstone sorting system? Then this datapack might be for you.
body:
Magic Sorting System reworked for 1.20
Tired of having to build overly complicated sorting systems to have a decent storage room or having a tangle of hoppers going every where for your automatic farms?? then this datapack might be for you.

Don't' get me wrong you still needs hoppers, but only a fraction of them and no complicated redstone to sort out which item goes where.

if you want to know more about how this pack works or you want the original magic sorting system made by jhuckaby for minecraft 1.16, you can find it here: https://github.com/jhuckaby/magic-sorting-system

This pack has a heavily modified sorting order from the original pack, (see the New_Sorting_order.md file inside the root of the pack) ONLY survival vanilla obtainable blocks/items are picked up and filtered. with one exception: the light block(as it is a creative block that can be used in survival if you have a recipe for it installed).  
the item frame must be within 64 blocks from the lapis/gold dump off point. However this is configured in the config.json so you can edit it if you need greater distances. but going above 128 is un-wise as most servers or even sp worlds hardly ever loads more than 128 blocks from the player but you need node.js (https://nodejs.org/) to recompile the pack after changing it! 

this pack is mainly made to fit my needs and play style so it might not suit everyone! //pesegolsson
